About Happy Landscaping - Landscaping | Lawncare Las Vegas NV

12+ years serving Las Vegas and surrounding areas

Happy Landscaping started with a simple goal: to bring vibrant, sustainable landscapes to the harsh Vegas environment. We saw too many yards struggling under the relentless sun and decided to do something about it.

Our approach is built on understanding the unique challenges of the Mojave Desert. We combine cutting-edge techniques with proven methods to create landscapes that thrive, conserve water, and enhance your property's value. We believe in open communication, meticulous planning, and delivering results that exceed expectations.

We're deeply invested in the Las Vegas community. We source local materials whenever possible, support local charities, and strive to be a responsible environmental steward. Our commitment extends beyond landscaping; we're building a greener, more beautiful Vegas for everyone.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Happy Landscaping Landscaping | Lawncare Las Vegas NV

Trusted landscaping company professionals serving Las Vegas, NV and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
